sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are standard corporate events that typically provide clarity on strategy without immediate financial impact.

headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group revises long-term strategy with focus on data analytics

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
